identity.name: AURAVITA
identity.mission: To bridge the gap between clinical efficacy and organic wellness through a digital experience that exudes trust, transparency, and tranquility.
identity.persona: The Clinical Botanist. A mix of Aesop's earthiness and Ritual's transparency.

headings.usage: Use for all H1-H3. Italicize key emotional words for emphasis.
headings.weight: Regular (400) for elegance, SemiBold (600) for impact

body.usage: Use for all body text, UI elements, and data display.
body.weight: Regular (400) for text, Medium (500) for UI labels

mono.usage: Use sparingly for 'Batch Numbers', 'Clinical Specs', or 'Citations'.

modes.marketing: Use 'Tetris' grid. Overlapping images, ample whitespace.
modes.dashboard: Use 'High Density' grid. 1px borders, compact data.

buttons.primary: bg-[#1C1917] text-[#FAFAF9] rounded-full px-8 py-4 hover:bg-[#2C3E30] transition-colors duration-300 font-medium tracking-wide
buttons.secondary: border border-[#1C1917] text-[#1C1917] rounded-full px-8 py-4 hover:bg-[#F5F5F4] transition-colors duration-300

cards.product: group relative bg-transparent hover:-translate-y-1 transition-transform duration-500
cards.feature: bg-[#FFFFFF] border border-[#E7E5E4] p-8 md:p-12 rounded-xl

inputs.default: bg-transparent border-b border-[#A8A29E] focus:border-[#1C1917] px-0 py-3 rounded-none placeholder:text-[#A8A29E] focus:ring-0 transition-colors

visual_enhancers.border_radius: rounded-none for images, rounded-full for buttons, rounded-xl for containers
visual_enhancers.textures: Use subtle noise overlay on solid backgrounds to reduce digital flatness.

animations.reveal: Staggered fade-up for text blocks (y: 20, opacity: 0 -> y:0, opacity: 1).
animations.hover: Scale images 1.05x on hover within overflow-hidden containers.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure 4.5:1 ratio for text. Use text-shadow if placing text over images.

hero.alt: Woman meditating by a calm lake with mountains in background

products.name: Luminous Serum
products.alt: White pump bottle on beige background

instructions_to_main_agent: INSTALL FONTS: Add the Google Fonts links to the HTML head immediately.
CLEAN SLATE: Remove any default React logos or boilerplates.
COMPONENT LIBRARY: Use shadcn/ui for functional elements (Cart, Modals, Forms) but style them to match the AURAVITA aesthetic (softer radius, custom fonts).
CUSTOM SECTIONS: Build the Hero, Ingredient Breakdown, and Story Timeline from scratch using Tailwind.
ICONS: Use 'lucide-react' for UI icons (Cart, Search, Menu) but keep them thin (stroke-width={1.5}).
NAVIGATION: Create a 'Mega Menu' that is full-width and reveals product categories with images.
PRODUCT PAGE: Implement a 'Sticky Add-to-Cart' bar that appears when scrolling past the main buy button.
MOBILE FIRST: Ensure the drawer cart and mobile menu are touch-optimized and occupy appropriate screen real estate.
CRITICAL: Do NOT use standard centered hero layouts. Use split screens or asymmetric grids.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories (especially sponsor logos) = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable
Create new components that match the style and conventions of existing components when needed
Examine existing components to understand the project's component patterns before creating new ones
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...)
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...})
